stocks.impact_theory: Arm announced its first in-house AI/AGI CPU chip, marking a shift from pure IP licensing to manufacturing high-performance silicon, projecting $15-25B annual revenue by 2031. Economically, this diversifies revenue amid AI boom, reducing reliance on licensees like Nvidia. Market psychology: FOMO on Nvidia-like pivot, best day in year. Historical parallel: Nvidia's 2023 GPU surge. Analogies: 1) Like Apple entering chip design with M1, vertical integration boosts margins. 2) Tesla's Dojo chip, capturing AI compute value.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show stock up 12-15% on news of AI chip revenue windfall; X sentiment positive on strategic shift despite some caution on margins/supply. Oil rally secondary boost to tech.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 20%+ gains on AI adoption, target $160+.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if supply issues emerge, potential 10% pullback to $120.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Customer pushback from incumbents, execution delays, valuation stretch.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst with revenue guidance, strong X/web buzz, historical AI chip precedents.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil prices fell 4% to $87 on US-Iran de-escalation hopes/Trump talks, easing jet fuel costs (30-40% of expenses). Econ: Lowers input costs, boosts margins amid capacity cuts. Psych: Relief rally after oil shock fears. Historical: 2022 oil drop lifted airlines 20%+. Analogies: 1) Like retailers on falling cotton prices. 2) Shipping firms on lower bunker fuel.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Airline stocks surging on oil pullback per web/X; UAL rebounding from recent lows, CEO comments highlight sensitivity but positive if sustained.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% upside to $85 if oil <80.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical reversal spiking oil, demand weakness.

stocks.justification: Strong oil correlation, but volatile geopolitics tempers high confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil drop on Middle East truce hopes hits XOM, world's largest by cap. Econ: Lower crude compresses refining/upstream margins. Psych: Profit-taking after YTD 37% rally. Historical: 2014 oil crash -30% for majors. Analogies: 1) Miners on falling copper. 2) Farmers on cheap grain.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: XLE -0.7%, XOM -0.85%; web notes valuation tops NVDA but oil eases; X mixed, positive on assets but de-escalation pressure.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long dip for 10% rebound if oil stabilizes $90+.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 8% drop to $150 on peace.

stocks.justification: Clear oil link, but Guyana/Permian growth supports.

stocks.impact_theory: CRM down 6% as Dow loser amid rotation from tech; debt-funded $25B buyback raises deceleration fears despite AI Agentforce growth. Econ: Signals undervaluation but questions organic growth. Psych: AI disruption worries. Historical: 2022 tech selloff. Analogies: 1) Like IBM in cloud shift. 2) Oracle pre-ERP pivot.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Noted as major Dow loser; X/web highlight AI risks/buyback optics despite strong FCF.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for re-rating to $320 on AI proof.

stocks.justification: Mixed signals: buyback bullish long-term, but near-term sentiment weak.

stocks.impact_theory: SATS top S&P performer +11%, short squeeze on 21.5% short interest post-S&P inclusion, SpaceX IPO speculation. Econ: Passive buying vs shorts. Psych: Momentum chase. Historical: GME squeeze. Analogies: 1) Like AMC shorts trapped. 2) Beyond Meat hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Top S&P gainer; X buzz on squeeze/SpaceX, web confirms rally.
